person.name: Thomas de Crophull

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Sir Thomas de Crophull was born circa 1350 at of Cotesbach & Newbold Verdun, Leicestershire, England. A settlement for the marriage Sir Thomas de Crophull and Sibilla de la Bere was made on 18 October 1371. They had 1 daughter (Agnes, wife of Sir Walter Devereux, of Sir John Parr, & of John Merbury, Esq.) Sir Thomas de Crophull died on 18 November 1381.

«b»Family«/b»
Sibilla de la Bere b. 19 May 1338, d. b 18 Nov 1381

«b»Child«/b»«tab»
Agnes Crophull b. c 1372, d. 3 Feb 1436

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Crophull於1335年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Sir John de Crophull13歲，母親Margery de Verdun25歲。他於1371年10月18日與Sibilla de La Bere在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年5月19日在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Crophull于1335年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Crophull13岁，母亲Margery de Verdun25岁。他于1371年10月18日与Sibilla de La Bere在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年5月19日在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Crophull was born in 1335, in Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir John de Crophull, was 13 and his mother, Margery de Verdun, was 25. He married Sibilla de La Bere on 18 October 1371, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 19 May 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Crophull est né en 1335, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Crophull, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Margery de Verdun, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Sibilla de La Bere le 18 octobre 1371, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Crophull 1335 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Crophull 13 und seine Mutter Margery de Verdun 25. Er hat am 18. Oktober 1371 in England Sibilla de La Bere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1382 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Crophull è nato il nel 1335 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Crophull, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Verdun, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Sibilla de La Bere il 18 ottobre 1371, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 maggio 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Crophullが1335年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Crophullは13歳，母Margery de Verdunは25歳であった。1371年10月18日にイギリスでSibilla de La Bereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年5月19日に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Crophull(이)가 1335년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Crophull(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Verdun(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1371년 10월 18일 영국에서 Sibilla de La Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 5월 19일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Crophull nasceu em 1335, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Crophull, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Verdun, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibilla de La Bere em 18 de outubro de 1371, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1382, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Crophull родился в 1335 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Crophull было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Verdun, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilla de La Bere 18 октября 1371 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 мая 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Crophull nació en 1335, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Crophull, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Margery de Verdun, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sibilla de La Bere el 18 de octubre de 1371, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
